game_info.title: Platform Panic Protocol
game_info.concept:
Platform game heroes through the ages have been abducted! 

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/platform-panic/id940103464

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Platform game heroes through the ages have been abducted! 
Pit them against each other in order to settle, once and for all, which one is the best!

• Can you unlock them all and become king of the leaderboard?
• Endlessly addictive, procedurally generated retro platformer!
• Super simple controls. Swipe left, right & up is all you need to move around.
• Pumping chiptune music by Eirik Suhrke, composer of Ridiculous Fishing and Super Crate Box.
• Cutting edge retro pixel graphics!


Important Message for Parents 
This game may include: 
- Direct links to social networking websites that are intended for an audience over the age of 13. 
- Direct links to the internet that can take players away from the game with the potential to browse any web page. 
- In-app purchases.
- Advertising of Nitrome products.
game_info.description: Platform Panic Protocol is an infinite, procedurally generated retro platformer. You play as a prototype hero robot being tested in an endless facility. Your objective is to navigate through dangerous rooms filled with spikes, drones, and crushing blocks. Collect Data Cells (coins) for points and reach the exit of each room to proceed to the next difficulty tier. How many rooms can you clear before your systems fail?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Move the hero
Arrow Key (Up) or Space: Jump (hold for higher jump)
Arrow Key (Down): Fast fall / Duck
Z: Dash (unlockable ability / boost)
ESC: Pause Game
R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)
ENTER: Start Game

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Physics and Movement Test. Verifies that the player entity responds to input, gravity works, and collision with static walls functions correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will continuously press the Right Arrow key. It will randomly press Jump (Space) every 1-2 seconds to test gravity and landing mechanics.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should move right, jump occasionally, and eventually either exit the room or hit a hazard. The game should not crash, and physics logs should show position updates.

TEST_2.test_description: Survival and Progression Test. Tests the game's ability to transition between procedural rooms and score counting.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller uses a heuristic: it identifies the location of the room exit and moves towards it. It triggers a jump if a gap (empty tile below) or wall (tile ahead) is detected.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should successfully navigate simple terrain, collect items, and trigger a room transition, incrementing the "Rooms Cleared" counter.
